positive: Minimalist geometric abstract design featuring a large stylized fox head in profile, integrated with celestial elements like crescent moons and constellations. The composition uses strong, clean silhouettes against a contrasting background. Color palette is muted earth tones (terracotta, sage green, dusty blue) accented by glowing gold foil accents. The style is contemporary Nordic folk art meets modern abstract vector art. Emphasis on perfect symmetry, crisp outlines, and a central, scalable graphic element suitable for apparel printing, high contrast for clear separation.
